testcase.name: runFullGraphSuite_allResultsNonNull
testcase.system-out: 02:41:39.942 [main] INFO com.graph.benchmark.GraphBenchmarkEngine -- === runFullGraphSuite: V=200 seed=42 runs=5 === 02:41:39.945 [main] INFO testcase.name: runFullGraphSuite_returns8Results
